title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
summary_full: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.
summary_public: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.
